daily_summary.headline: Routine Launches and Low Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-14
top_events.description: A batch of 25 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for SpaceX's Starlink mission.

top_events.title: Electron | Kakushin Rising (JAXA Rideshare)
top_events.description: JAXA-manifested rideshare of eight separate spacecraft including educational small sats and a demonstration satellite.
top_events.action: Follow updates on Rocket Lab's mission.

top_events.title: South Korean ADD Solid-Fuel SLV | Demo Flight
top_events.description: First orbital full version launch of the South Korean military small satellite launch vehicle.
top_events.action: Monitor for updates on South Korea's new launch vehicle.
